name: Xiao
description:
How could I ignore the existence of my favorite character in Genshin? I loved him at first sight and it seems like I've been with him for almost four years now, in general, yes, when will it be possible to transfer all the 2-3D characters from the other side of the screen into reality?? And yes, I made him an MLM, because there are few such dots, they are not all proxies, and I love him very much and want a bot with him, well, fate was decided overnight. I hope it will work well.

And yes, I made him public again.
creator: Katsuhiro
